jsonLd.title: Principal Investment Banker at FreeCharge
jsonLd.description:
We at FreeCharge are looking for an experienced Investment Banker based out of Madurai. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About FreeCharge:
FreeCharge is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Due Diligence

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Referral bonus program
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with FreeCharge!
